procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1021.003
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1021.003 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

sigma.title: Suspicious Non PowerShell WSMAN COM Provider
DCOM InternetExplorer.Application Iertutil DLL Hijack - Security
Potential DCOM InternetExplorer.Application DLL Hijack - Image Load
Suspicious BitLocker Access Agent Update Utility Execution

osquery.name: t1021_003_ssh_keys
osquery.query_text: SELECT uid, path, filename, size, mtime FROM file WHERE path LIKE '%/.ssh/%' LIMIT 50;

osquery.name: t1021_003_net_conn
osquery.query_text: SELECT pid, local_address, local_port, remote_address, remote_port, state FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_port IN (22, 135, 139, 445, 3389, 5985, 5986) AND state = 'ESTABLISHED' LIMIT 100;

sigma_matches.title: Suspicious Non PowerShell WSMAN COM Provider
DCOM InternetExplorer.Application Iertutil DLL Hijack - Security
Potential DCOM InternetExplorer.Application DLL Hijack - Image Load
Suspicious BitLocker Access Agent Update Utility Execution

executions.reason: Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence
Live SOAR response execution for MITRE S5 linkage evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation: 3 reproducible real sandbox runs across ≥3 executions, 8 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 2 osquery correlations, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.
